Class GameManager

java.lang.Object
controller.GameManager
public class GameManager extends Object
Singleton controller managing the core game logic, flow, state, and interaction between the user interface and the underlying logic components.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    calculateDeployableTiles()
    Computes the subset of tiles currently legal for deployment and highlights them.
    void
    checkAndTriggerAllAttackerPlans()
    Iterates through all currently pending attacker plans and immediately forces their execution if their target area satisfies trigger conditions, removing them from the queue.
    boolean
    checkGameEnd()
    Verifies the primary victory conditions (unit wipes, town destruction, or round limits) to determine if the match has concluded.
    void
    checkTurnEnd()
    Assesses whether the active team has exhausted all available unit actions, automatically ending the phase if true.
    void
    deselectTile()
    Clears the current tile selection and drops the action mode.
    void
    dropActionMode()
    Cancels the current action mode (resets to NONE) and updates tile highlights.
    void
    endCurrentPhase()
    Explicitly forces an end to the current player-controlled phase and jumps to the next logic state.
    void
    executeMove(Tile current, Tile destination, boolean doTeleport)
    Determines the optimal path and executes the movement for a unit from its current position to a destination, notifying the UI to animate the pathing.
    List<List<Tile>>
    getAttackableTiles()
    Retrieves the list of grouped tiles representing valid attack patterns.
    RoundPhase
    getCurrentPhase()
    Retrieves the current phase of the round.
    List<Tile>
    getDangerTiles()
    Retrieves the list of danger tiles generated by pending enemy attacks.
    List<Tile>
    getDeployableTiles()
    Retrieves the list of tiles valid for unit deployment.
    Team
    getDeploymentTeam()
    Retrieves the team currently taking their deployment turns.
    Grid
    getGrid()
    Retrieves the current game grid.
    Tile
    getHoveredTile()
    Retrieves the currently hovered tile.
    List<Tile>
    getImpactTiles()
    Retrieves the list of tiles that will be hit by an active attack preview.
    static GameManager
    getInstance()
    Retrieves the single, globally accessible instance of the GameManager.
    List<Tile>
    getReachableTiles()
    Retrieves the list of tiles that are reachable for movement.
    int
    getRoundNumber()
    Retrieves the current round number.
    UnitStats
    getSelectedDeployUnit()
    Retrieves the stats of the unit currently selected for deployment.
    Tile
    getSelectedTile()
    Retrieves the currently selected tile.
    void
    handleTileClick(Tile clickedTile)
    The main entry point for processing mouse clicks on the game grid.
    boolean
    isDeploymentMode()
    Checks if the game is currently in the pre-game deployment phase.
    boolean
    isExecuting()
    Checks if the game is currently executing forced actions (moving units, resolving attacks, or ending).
    boolean
    isMovingUnits()
    Checks if units are currently in the middle of a movement animation.
    boolean
    isUnitPhase(BaseUnit unit)
    Verifies if it is currently legal for the provided unit to take actions based on the current round phase.
    void
    print(String log)
    Standard utility to simultaneously print system data to the console and to the in-game UI log panel.
    void
    resetGame()
    Resets the entire internal state of the game.
    void
    selectDeployUnit(UnitStats stats)
    Selects a unit from the UI deployment bag to prepare it for placement, calculating viable tiles.
    void
    setDeploymentMode(boolean deploymentMode)
    Enables or disables deployment mode.
    void
    setGrid(Grid gameGrid)
    Sets the game grid to be used by the manager.
    void
    setHoveredTile(Tile tile)
    Sets the tile currently being hovered over by the mouse pointer.
    void
    setMovingUnits(boolean movingUnits)
    Sets the unit movement state flag to track animations.
    void
    setOnBagUpdated(Consumer<List<UnitStats>> listener)
    Sets the UI listener invoked when the contents of the deployment bag change.
    void
    setOnDeploymentTeamChanged(Consumer<Team> listener)
    Sets the UI listener invoked when deployment sides swap.
    void
    setOnGameEnded(Consumer<Team> listener)
    Sets the UI listener invoked when a match reaches its conclusion.
    void
    setOnLogChanged(Consumer<String> listener)
    Sets the UI listener invoked when new information is added to the system logs.
    void
    setOnPhaseChanged(Consumer<RoundPhase> listener)
    Sets the UI listener invoked when a new phase of combat begins.
    void
    setOnTilesUpdated(Consumer<Tile> listener)
    Sets the UI listener invoked when tiles change specific states.
    void
    setOnUnitDied(Consumer<BaseUnit> listener)
    Sets the UI listener invoked when a unit falls in battle.
    void
    setOnUnitMoved(BiConsumer<BaseUnit, List<Tile>> listener)
    Sets the UI listener invoked when a unit successfully calculates movement.
    void
    setOnUnitSpawned(Consumer<BaseUnit> listener)
    Sets the UI listener invoked when a new unit spawns onto the board.
    void
    setSelectedTile(Tile tile)
    Sets the actively selected tile and triggers a UI update.
    void
    showLog(String logs)
    Updates the internal log string and prompts a UI update.
    void
    spawnEnvironment(String mapId)
    Loads the map blueprint by ID and spawns the required environmental objects onto the grid based on the blueprint layout.
    void
    startAtt()
    Development utility to bypass deployment and force an immediate start to the Attacker Phase.
    void
    startGame(List<UnitStats> attackerPicks, List<UnitStats> defenderPicks, String mapId)
    Initializes a fresh match, spawning environments, passing unit picks into deployment pools, and activating the initial setup phase.
    void
    toggleActionMode()
    Toggles the active mode of the selected unit between MOVING and ATTACKING, provided the unit still has the capability to perform the respective action.
    void
    toggleSelection(Tile tile)
    Handles the logic for selecting, deselecting, and setting action modes when a user interacts with a specific tile on the board.
    void
    updateTiles()
    Recalculates all tactical tile sets (reachable, attackable, impact, danger) based on current selections and game state, then notifies the UI to update.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Method Details

    • getInstance

      public static GameManager getInstance()
      Retrieves the single, globally accessible instance of the GameManager. Instantiates it if it does not yet exist.
      Returns:
      The GameManager instance.

    • resetGame

      public void resetGame()
      Resets the entire internal state of the game. Clears the grid, tracking lists, deployment pools, and resets phase trackers to prepare for a completely new match while preserving the same Singleton instance.

    • getGrid

      public Grid getGrid()
      Retrieves the current game grid.
      Returns:
      The Grid currently in use.

    • setGrid

      public void setGrid(Grid gameGrid)
      Sets the game grid to be used by the manager.
      Parameters:
      gameGrid - The new Grid to manage.

    • getRoundNumber

      public int getRoundNumber()
      Retrieves the current round number.
      Returns:
      The current round number.

    • isMovingUnits

      public boolean isMovingUnits()
      Checks if units are currently in the middle of a movement animation.
      Returns:
      true if units are moving, false otherwise.

    • setMovingUnits

      public void setMovingUnits(boolean movingUnits)
      Sets the unit movement state flag to track animations.
      Parameters:
      movingUnits - true to lock input during movement, false to unlock.

    • isExecuting

      public boolean isExecuting()
      Checks if the game is currently executing forced actions (moving units, resolving attacks, or ending). Used to block user input during these periods.
      Returns:
      true if the game is executing actions, false if awaiting player input.

    • getCurrentPhase

      public RoundPhase getCurrentPhase()
      Retrieves the current phase of the round.
      Returns:
      The current RoundPhase.

    • toggleActionMode

      public void toggleActionMode()
      Toggles the active mode of the selected unit between MOVING and ATTACKING, provided the unit still has the capability to perform the respective action.

    • dropActionMode

      public void dropActionMode()
      Cancels the current action mode (resets to NONE) and updates tile highlights.

    • getSelectedTile

      public Tile getSelectedTile()
      Retrieves the currently selected tile.
      Returns:
      The selected Tile, or null if none is selected.

    • setSelectedTile

      public void setSelectedTile(Tile tile)
      Sets the actively selected tile and triggers a UI update.
      Parameters:
      tile - The tile to select.

    • deselectTile

      public void deselectTile()
      Clears the current tile selection and drops the action mode.

    • toggleSelection

      public void toggleSelection(Tile tile)
      Handles the logic for selecting, deselecting, and setting action modes when a user interacts with a specific tile on the board.
      Parameters:
      tile - The tile being toggled.

    • getHoveredTile

      public Tile getHoveredTile()
      Retrieves the currently hovered tile.
      Returns:
      The hovered Tile.

    • setHoveredTile

      public void setHoveredTile(Tile tile)
      Sets the tile currently being hovered over by the mouse pointer.
      Parameters:
      tile - The hovered Tile.

    • handleTileClick

      public void handleTileClick(Tile clickedTile)
      The main entry point for processing mouse clicks on the game grid. Routes the click to deployment logic, movement execution, attack execution, or standard selection.
      Parameters:
      clickedTile - The tile that the player clicked.

    • getReachableTiles

      public List<Tile> getReachableTiles()
      Retrieves the list of tiles that are reachable for movement.
      Returns:
      A list of reachable tiles.

    • getAttackableTiles

      public List<List<Tile>> getAttackableTiles()
      Retrieves the list of grouped tiles representing valid attack patterns.
      Returns:
      A list containing groups of attackable tiles.

    • getImpactTiles

      public List<Tile> getImpactTiles()
      Retrieves the list of tiles that will be hit by an active attack preview.
      Returns:
      A list of impacted tiles.

    • getDangerTiles

      public List<Tile> getDangerTiles()
      Retrieves the list of danger tiles generated by pending enemy attacks.
      Returns:
      A list of danger tiles.

    • getDeployableTiles

      public List<Tile> getDeployableTiles()
      Retrieves the list of tiles valid for unit deployment.
      Returns:
      A list of deployable tiles.

    • updateTiles

      public void updateTiles()
      Recalculates all tactical tile sets (reachable, attackable, impact, danger) based on current selections and game state, then notifies the UI to update.

    • spawnEnvironment

      public void spawnEnvironment(String mapId)
      Loads the map blueprint by ID and spawns the required environmental objects onto the grid based on the blueprint layout.
      Parameters:
      mapId - The ID of the map blueprint to load.

    • executeMove

      public void executeMove(Tile current, Tile destination, boolean doTeleport)
      Determines the optimal path and executes the movement for a unit from its current position to a destination, notifying the UI to animate the pathing.
      Parameters:
      current - The starting tile.
      destination - The target tile.
      doTeleport - If true, bypasses pathfinding and moves instantly.

    • checkAndTriggerAllAttackerPlans

      public void checkAndTriggerAllAttackerPlans()
      Iterates through all currently pending attacker plans and immediately forces their execution if their target area satisfies trigger conditions, removing them from the queue.

    • isDeploymentMode

      public boolean isDeploymentMode()
      Checks if the game is currently in the pre-game deployment phase.
      Returns:
      true if the game is in deployment mode, false otherwise.

    • setDeploymentMode

      public void setDeploymentMode(boolean deploymentMode)
      Enables or disables deployment mode.
      Parameters:
      deploymentMode - true to activate deployment state, false to deactivate.

    • getDeploymentTeam

      public Team getDeploymentTeam()
      Retrieves the team currently taking their deployment turns.
      Returns:
      The active Team for deployment.

    • selectDeployUnit

      public void selectDeployUnit(UnitStats stats)
      Selects a unit from the UI deployment bag to prepare it for placement, calculating viable tiles.
      Parameters:
      stats - The stats of the unit being selected.

    • getSelectedDeployUnit

      public UnitStats getSelectedDeployUnit()
      Retrieves the stats of the unit currently selected for deployment.
      Returns:
      The UnitStats of the held unit, or null if none is selected.

    • calculateDeployableTiles

      public void calculateDeployableTiles()
      Computes the subset of tiles currently legal for deployment and highlights them.

    • startGame

      public void startGame(List<UnitStats> attackerPicks, List<UnitStats> defenderPicks, String mapId)
      Initializes a fresh match, spawning environments, passing unit picks into deployment pools, and activating the initial setup phase.
      Parameters:
      attackerPicks - List of unit stats chosen by the attacker.
      defenderPicks - List of unit stats chosen by the defender.
      mapId - The ID of the current map blueprint.

    • isUnitPhase

      public boolean isUnitPhase(BaseUnit unit)
      Verifies if it is currently legal for the provided unit to take actions based on the current round phase.
      Parameters:
      unit - The unit attempting to perform an action.
      Returns:
      true if it is the unit's phase, false otherwise.

    • endCurrentPhase

      public void endCurrentPhase()
      Explicitly forces an end to the current player-controlled phase and jumps to the next logic state.

    • checkTurnEnd

      public void checkTurnEnd()
      Assesses whether the active team has exhausted all available unit actions, automatically ending the phase if true.

    • checkGameEnd

      public boolean checkGameEnd()
      Verifies the primary victory conditions (unit wipes, town destruction, or round limits) to determine if the match has concluded.
      Returns:
      true if the game is over, false if play should continue.

    • setOnTilesUpdated

      public void setOnTilesUpdated(Consumer<Tile> listener)
      Sets the UI listener invoked when tiles change specific states.
      Parameters:
      listener - The Consumer accepting a Tile.

    • setOnUnitSpawned

      public void setOnUnitSpawned(Consumer<BaseUnit> listener)
      Sets the UI listener invoked when a new unit spawns onto the board.
      Parameters:
      listener - The Consumer accepting a BaseUnit.

    • setOnUnitDied

      public void setOnUnitDied(Consumer<BaseUnit> listener)
      Sets the UI listener invoked when a unit falls in battle.
      Parameters:
      listener - The Consumer accepting a BaseUnit.

    • setOnUnitMoved

      public void setOnUnitMoved(BiConsumer<BaseUnit, List<Tile>> listener)
      Sets the UI listener invoked when a unit successfully calculates movement.
      Parameters:
      listener - The BiConsumer accepting the unit and its path.

    • setOnPhaseChanged

      public void setOnPhaseChanged(Consumer<RoundPhase> listener)
      Sets the UI listener invoked when a new phase of combat begins.
      Parameters:
      listener - The Consumer accepting the new RoundPhase.

    • setOnDeploymentTeamChanged

      public void setOnDeploymentTeamChanged(Consumer<Team> listener)
      Sets the UI listener invoked when deployment sides swap.
      Parameters:
      listener - The Consumer accepting the active deployment Team.

    • setOnBagUpdated

      public void setOnBagUpdated(Consumer<List<UnitStats>> listener)
      Sets the UI listener invoked when the contents of the deployment bag change.
      Parameters:
      listener - The Consumer accepting the updated List of UnitStats.

    • setOnLogChanged

      public void setOnLogChanged(Consumer<String> listener)
      Sets the UI listener invoked when new information is added to the system logs.
      Parameters:
      listener - The Consumer accepting the latest String log.

    • setOnGameEnded

      public void setOnGameEnded(Consumer<Team> listener)
      Sets the UI listener invoked when a match reaches its conclusion.
      Parameters:
      listener - The Consumer accepting the winning Team.

    • showLog

      public void showLog(String logs)
      Updates the internal log string and prompts a UI update.
      Parameters:
      logs - The string content to log.

    • print

      public void print(String log)
      Standard utility to simultaneously print system data to the console and to the in-game UI log panel.
      Parameters:
      log - The string content to print and log.

    • startAtt

      public void startAtt()
      Development utility to bypass deployment and force an immediate start to the Attacker Phase. Marked for removal prior to release.
